title: Sum of Beauty in the Array

testcases.input: nums = [1,2,3] Output: 2 Explanation: For each index i in the range 1 <= i <= 1: - The beauty of nums[1] equals 2.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: For each index i in the range 1 <= i <= 1: - The beauty of nums[1] equals 2.

testcases.input: nums = [2,4,6,4] Output: 1 Explanation: For each index i in the range 1 <= i <= 2: - The beauty of nums[1] equals 1. - The beauty of nums[2] equals 0.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: For each index i in the range 1 <= i <= 2: - The beauty of nums[1] equals 1. - The beauty of nums[2] equals 0.

testcases.input: nums = [3,2,1] Output: 0 Explanation: For each index i in the range 1 <= i <= 1: - The beauty of nums[1] equals 0.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: For each index i in the range 1 <= i <= 1: - The beauty of nums[1] equals 0.
